news.headline: Kenya's BNPL market to reach $1.18 billion by 2025, growing at 13.6% annually. Market saw 23% CAGR during 2021-2024.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on "Kenya Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities" has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The report provides insights into the BNPL market in Kenya, projecting a 13.6% annual growth rate to reach US$1.18 billion by 2025. From 2021 to 2024, the BNPL market in Kenya saw strong expansion, with a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 23. This data highlights the increasing prominence of BNPL services in the country's payment landscape.

news.headline: Solana's user activity drops by 40% due to memecoin rug pulls, leading to outflows to Ethereum and Arbitrum. Analysts foresee long-term benefits for Solana.
news.summary: An increase in fraud and deception schemes with Solana memecoins, along with sudden withdrawals of funds, have been prompting the movement of capital towards Ethereum and Arbitrum. This trend has led to a decrease in user engagement on Solana. However, experts suggest that this shift could potentially have positive implications for Solana in the future.

news.headline: US administration believes Kurdish oil sales can help to lower oil prices, offset drop in Iranian supplies — sources.
Tempter's hemp-infused brand sponsors WSWA Access LIVE 2025, largest alcohol conf, with country music and innovation.
news.summary: A well-known hemp-infused drink brand, Tempter's, has secured the position of title sponsor at the largest alcohol industry conference. This significant development took place at WSWA's Access LIVE 2025 event in Knoxville, Tennessee, on February 21, 2025. Tempter's played a key role in sponsoring the opening and closing receptions at the conference, solidifying its presence in the industry. This move further establishes Tempter's as a prominent player in the market, showcasing its commitment to growth and visibility.

news.headline: Kiehl's releases Ultra Facial Barrier-Hydrating Cleanser, soap-free cream-to-foam, gently cleanses and hydrates skin.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, a new product was launched by Kiehl's, known as the Ultra Facial Barrier-Hydrating Cleanser. This addition to the popular Ultra Facial line is a soap-free amino acid cream-to-foam cleanser designed to effectively remove impurities from the skin while providing hydration and support. The product aims to cater to individuals looking for a gentle yet effective cleanser.

news.headline: The US administration asked Iraq to resume Kurdish oil exports quickly or face sanctions alongside Iran - Sources.
MP Materials Corp. reported a 48% revenue surge in Q4, reaching $61.0 million, boosted by higher production and sales.
news.summary: Shares of MP Materials Corp. (NYSE:MP) are rising in premarket trading following the company's report of a 48% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter revenue to $61.0 million, surpassing the predicted $51.0 million. The boost in revenue was primarily fueled by higher sales in the Materials Segment, driven by increased NdPr oxide and metal sales from transitioning to midstream production. Despite a scheduled maintenance shutdown, the company was able to produce 11,478 metric tons of rare earth oxides (REO) in concentrate and sold 7,803 metric tons.

news.headline: Domino's Pizza (NASDAQ: DPZ) to release Q4 earnings. Analysts predict $4.91 per share, revenue of $1.48B. Stock target price: $500. Annual dividend yield: 1.27%.
news.summary: Before the market opening on Monday, Feb. 24, Domino’s Pizza, Inc. (NASDAQ:DPZ) is scheduled to announce its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts are predicting quarterly earnings of $4.91 per share, a jump from $4.48 per share in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal quarterly revenue of $1.48 billion, an increase from $1.4 billion a year ago. RBC Capital analyst Logan Reich has reiterated an Outperform rating on Domino’s Pizza, with a maintained target price of $500. Investors are also interested in the company's dividends, as Domino’s currently offers an annual dividend yield of 1.27%, equivalent to a quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share ($6.04 yearly). For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: ATB Financial reports strong Q3 results for FY 2025, with $566.7M revenue, $53.6B net loans, $43.5B deposits, $203.7M other income.
news.summary: ATB Financial reported strong third-quarter results for fiscal year 2025, with total revenue reaching $566.7 million, a 9.4% increase from the previous year. Net loans increased by 5.5% to $53.6 billion, while total deposits rose by 8.3% to $43.5 billion. Other income grew to $203.7 million, showcasing the success of their advisory services. With $36.6 billion in assets under administration, ATB Financial solidified its position as a top investment firm in Western Canada. President and CEO Curtis Stange reassured clients about potential tariff impacts on the economy, emphasizing the organization's commitment to helping clients navigate the situation.

news.headline: Computerized sewing and embroidery machine market to grow at 4.8% CAGR, reaching USD 3.6 billion by 2035, driven by tech advancements and rising demand for personalized solutions in textile industries.
news.summary: The computerized sewing and embroidery machine market is poised for substantial growth, having reached a value of US$2.2 billion in 2024. It is expected to expand at a CAGR of 4.8% from 2025 to 2035, reaching US$3.6 billion by the end of 2035. This growth is fueled by technological advancements, automation in textile production, and a rising demand for personalized solutions. Key players in the market include Brother Industries, Janome Corporation, Bernina International AG, and Juki Corporation, who are investing in R&D for AI-equipped machines. The market offers intricate designs with minimal manual effort, appealing to sectors such as apparel manufacturing and home décor. Companies are introducing advanced features like AI-driven error detection and cloud-based design storage. Industry trends point towards machines with high-speed stitching capabilities and multi-needle configurations to meet evolving consumer needs. Key developments include Brother International Australia's new models catering to different industrial and home-based demands. The market snapshot indicates a forecast of US$3.6 billion by 2035 with a CAGR of 4.8%. Industries adopting these machines include apparel manufacturing, home décor, automotive textiles, and DIY crafts.

news.headline: Appotronics, listed on the STAR Market in China, to supply static automotive lights to a top automaker.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on Feb. 21, 2025, Appotronics (688007.SH), a leading firm on the STAR Market of the Shanghai Stock Exchange, disclosed getting a development notification from a major global car manufacturer. The notification designates...

news.headline: Sales at BJ's, Costco, PriceSmart and Sam's Club reach $431 billion in 2024 - Warehouse Club Focus Report.
news.summary: A newsletter called "Warehouse Club Focus" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This publication, started in 1997, provides exclusive reports on the warehouse club industry twice a month. Authored by a former club buyer, it has published over 655 issues to date. In 2024, sales at major clubs like BJ's, Costco, PriceSmart, and Sam's Club reached $431 billion. "Warehouse Club Focus" is highly regarded in the industry, with even the largest consumer packaged goods companies as regular readers.

news.headline: Invisors earns 2025 Great Place To Work Certification™ in US and UK for the 5th consecutive year based on employee feedback.
news.summary: Invisors, with headquarters in Atlanta and Glasgow, Scotland, has recently achieved its 5th consecutive certification by Great Place To Work®. This recognition is solely determined by feedback from employees regarding their workplace satisfaction. The most recent surveys conducted showcase the positive experiences of Invisors' employees, solidifying its reputation as a top workplace for the 5th year.

news.headline: EU urged to unite by former Ambassador Ischinger on Germany, Ukraine, and Trump.Important message for EU leaders.
news.summary: In a recent study, researchers found that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.8%, its lowest level in over a year. The economy added 678,000 jobs in the past month, surpassing expectations and marking a significant improvement in the labor market. The decrease in unemployment was seen across various sectors, with the service industry showing the most growth. Additionally, the average hourly earnings for workers increased by 2.5%, indicating potential wage growth in the near future. Overall, these findings point towards a positive trend in the US job market, reflecting a strengthening economy.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent: I also stressed the Trump Administration's commitment to trade and economic policies that protect US - Statement.
PioCreat 3D spins off HALOT series from Creality to meet market demand, merger announced, bold move.
news.summary: Shenzhen, China - On February 21, 2025, PioCreat 3D, an industrial-grade 3D printing brand founded by a Creality co-founder, has confirmed the integration of Creality's HALOT line of resin 3D printers into the PioCreat brand. This strategic decision enhances the product lineup of PioCreat, leveraging the established reputation of both brands. The merger aims at maximizing effectiveness and capitalizing on combined resources to strengthen the market position.

news.headline: WestKam Gold cancels deal to acquire Powerline One Uranium Project in Utah - covering 2,649 acres on 131 lode claims.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, WestKam Gold Corp. (TSX-V:WKG) revealed the termination of discussions to acquire a complete legal and beneficial stake in 131 lode claims situated in Grand County, Utah. The claims span over 2,649 acres (1,072 hectares) and constitute the Powerline One Project, marking the conclusion of negotiations for this significant land parcel.

news.headline: HBAR Foundation boosts institutional tokenization role by investing in Fidelity International's USD Money Market Fund, tokenized by Archax - LONDON, Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: The HBAR Foundation has received an investment that bolsters its position in institutional tokenization and aids in advancing Fidelity International's strategy for distributing digital assets. This development, disclosed on February 21, 2025, in London, underscores the Foundation's role in the industry. The investment marks a significant move for professional investors and comes with associated risks.

news.headline: OneCompass Holdings buys Aquinas Leadership Group to enhance training services for pharma industry. Acquisition announced on Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio on February 21, 2025, OneCompass Holdings (OCH), a renowned company specializing in cutting-edge business solutions, disclosed its recent acquisition of Aquinas. Aquinas is a top-notch firm offering sales and compliance training specifically tailored for the pharmaceutical and medical device sectors. This move is set to significantly impact the industry landscape, aligning the expertise of both companies to enhance services.

news.headline: Chinese animated film "Ne Zha 2" is a global hit, biggest blockbuster after five years, captivating viewers with a demon child.
news.summary: In Beijing on February 21, 2025, a report from China.org.cn highlighted the success of the Chinese animated film "Ne Zha 2: Demon Child Conquers the Sea." The movie, featuring the popular character with distinctive dark eye circles, has gone viral, making it the top blockbuster in China five years after its release. With record-breaking numbers at the box office, "Ne Zha 2" has captivated audiences nationwide, solidifying its status as a cultural phenomenon in the country.

news.headline: Guidehouse has appointed Erik Barnett and Brian Smit to lead healthcare technology and managed services, aiming to enhance AI-driven transformation and revenue cycle efficiency.
news.summary: Guidehouse, a global consultancy offering advisory, technology, and managed services to businesses and governmental entities, based in McLean, Virginia, has announced the appointment of Erik Barnett and Brian Smit. This move signifies the firm's dedication to embracing AI-driven transformation and improving revenue cycle efficiency. The announcement was made on February 21, 2025.

news.headline: US Treasury Secretary Bessent in a call with China's Vice Premier: Expressed serious concerns about China's counternarcotics efforts, economic imbalances, and unfair policies - Treasury Statement.
The Fellowship to exhibit at NRB Convention for 3rd time with largest booth (#801) from Feb 24-27, 2025; podcast guests to feature.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 21, 2025, the International Fellowship of Christians and Jews (The Fellowship) announced their participation at the NRB Convention in Grapevine, Texas from February 24-27, 2025. This marks their third consecutive year at the event, showcasing at Booth #801 with their largest booth yet. The convention is expected to attract numerous attendees and industry professionals.

news.headline: ICE reports January 2025 U.S. mortgage performance: Delinquency rate at 3.47%, down 6.56% from previous month.
news.summary: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE), a key global technology and data provider, has released a preliminary overview of January 2025 month-end mortgage performance figures based on its comprehensive loan-level database covering the majority of the U.S. mortgage market. As of Jan. 31, 2025, the total U.S. loan delinquency rate stands at 3.47%, representing loans that are 30 or more days past due but not in foreclosure. This marks a month-over-month decline of 6.56% and a year-over-year increase of 2.

news.headline: SEON to showcase fraud prevention at SBC Summit Rio, highlighting new iGaming regulations in Brazil. Law No. 14,790/2023 and SPA/MF Ordinance No. 827/2024 in effect from Jan 1, 2025.
news.summary: SEON, a renowned digital fraud prevention and compliance company, will be showcasing their latest fraud prevention solutions at the upcoming SBC Summit Rio, held at booth B140. The company has enhanced its platform to cater to the newly regulated iGaming market in Brazil. Following the enactment of Law No. 14,790/2023 and SPA/MF Ordinance No. 827/2024 on January 1, 2025, gaming companies are required to obtain authorization from Brazil's Secretariat of Prizes and Bets (SPA/MF) to conduct operations and promotional activities within the country.

news.headline: IQVIA's CFO Ron Bruehlman to speak at TD Cowen Annual Health Care Conference on March 4, 2025 at 11:10 a.m. ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: IQVIA Holdings Inc. revealed that Ron Bruehlman, the company's CFO and EVP, is set to address the TD Cowen Annual Health Care Conference on March 4, 2025, at 11:10 a.m. Eastern Time. An audio webcast of the speech can be accessed live on the IQVIA Investor Relations site at http://ir.iqvia.com, with a replay available on the same day. IQVIA (NYSE:IQV) is a noted company in the industry.

news.headline: DAS to showcase two aircraft seat models at AIX 2025 in Hamburg Messe, Germany, targeting global market expansion.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, DAS is demonstrating its dedication to the worldwide aircraft seat industry by presenting two aircraft seat models at AIX 2025 in Hamburg Messe, Germany.

news.headline: Hartford HealthCare partners with K Health for new virtual health platform HHC 24/7, transforming primary care.
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut, Hartford HealthCare has introduced a new virtual health platform called HHC 24/7. This platform utilizes K Health's cutting-edge clinical artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Vietnam's BNPL market to reach $2.61 billion by 2025, set to grow to $8.5+ billion by 2030 with key players.
news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report titled "Vietnam Buy Now Pay Later Business and Investment Opportunities Databook" has been introduced by ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights over 75 key performance indicators on the BNPL market in Vietnam, including market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics. It has been updated in Q1 of 2025. Projections indicate that the BNPL payment market in Vietnam is poised for significant expansion, with an anticipated 36.5% annual growth rate, reaching US$2.61 billion by 2025. Notably, the BNPL sector in Vietnam demonstrated strong growth between 2021 and 2024, achieving a remarkable compound annual growth rate.

news.headline: T-Mobile and MLB debut 5G-powered Automated Ball-Strike System in Major League Spring Training in Tampa, Florida.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) revealed its partnership with MLB by introducing the MLB’s automated ball-strike system (ABS) using a private 5G Advanced Network Solution (ANS). This marks the debut of the ABS at the major league level, with the 5G-powered system set to launch during spring training games at Steinbrenner Field in Tampa, Florida on Feb. 21. T-Mobile is also set to bring this innovative technology to a wider audience.

news.headline: $AAPL $QCOM Apple plans to replace Qualcomm modems in the rest of its iPhones with Apple modems - The Information.
Carrier Global Corporation will host its 2025 Investor Day in NYC on May 19, 2025, featuring Chairman & CEO David Gitlin.
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR) has announced that it will hold its 2025 Investor Day on May 19, 2025, in New York City. The event will feature Chairman & CEO David Gitlin and other key leaders who will outline the company's strategic objectives. This meeting is anticipated to be an essential platform for shareholders and investors to gain insights into the company's direction moving forward.

news.headline: ESR introduces new iPhone 16e lineup with enhanced protection and MagSafe functionality, leading brand on Amazon.
news.summary: ESR has introduced its newest range of products designed to enhance the experience of iPhone 16e users by providing superior protection and seamless MagSafe functionality. This announcement was made in Wilmington, Delaware on February 21, 2025. ESR, known as the leading brand for MagSafe accessories on Amazon, aims to offer users innovative options to safeguard their devices while ensuring ease of use.

news.headline: LILYSILK releases Spring 2025 collection named "Whispers of Grace", inspired by ballet elegance and suburban serenity.
news.summary: In New York on February 21, 2025, LILYSILK unveiled its Spring 2025 collection, "Whispers of Grace." As a prominent silk brand, LILYSILK aims to encourage individuals to embrace remarkable and eco-conscious lifestyles. The collection draws inspiration from ballet's sophistication and the serene allure of nature.

news.headline: Saltair body oils will be exclusively sold at Ulta Beauty starting Feb 23. Brand founded by Iskra Lawrence. Los Angeles, Feb. 21, 2025.
news.summary: Starting February 23, 2025, Ulta Beauty will exclusively offer the popular body oils from Saltair, the renowned bodycare brand established by model and entrepreneur Iskra Lawrence. The brand's award-winning products will be available at Ulta, marking a significant expansion for Saltair.

news.headline: NexPoint delays vote on UDF IV's proposed merger with Ready Capital, calls for board to review competing proposal.
news.summary: NexPoint has decided to postpone its vote and urges shareholders to hold off on the merger vote to pressure the board to thoroughly assess any other offers. They are asking UDF IV Board to delay the March 4 Special Meeting by 30 days and collaborate with NexPoint to secure the most beneficial result for shareholders.

news.headline: Ginkgo Bioworks partners with Volta Labs to integrate Callisto Sample Prep System for NGS processes.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Boston, a prominent genomics applications company known as Volta Labs, partnered with Ginkgo Bioworks, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol DNA. The announcement was made regarding the incorporation of the Callisto™ Sample Prep System at Ginkgo Bioworks. This integration signifies a significant advancement in genetic research and biosecurity protocols.

news.headline: Sphere Entertainment Co. will host earnings conference call on Feb 28, 2025, discussing Q4 results of up to Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Sphere Entertainment Co. (NYSE: SPHR) is set to hold a conference call to review their performance for the quarter ending December 31, 2024 on February 28, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. EST. The company will also release a press statement to announce their financial results.

news.headline: B. Riley Securities hosting Precision Oncology & Radiopharma Investor Conference in NYC on Feb 28, 2025, featuring 30+ experts.
news.summary: A leading middle market investment bank, B. Riley Securities, Inc. ("B. Riley"), has announced that it will be organizing the Precision Oncology & Radiopharma Investor Conference on February 28, 2025, in New York City. With over 30 featured speakers, the conference aims to provide insights into the latest developments in the field.

news.headline: T. Hasegawa USA expands its flavor innovation center in California to support developing best-in-class flavors globally.
news.summary: The recently upgraded research and development center will enhance the global flavor industry leader's efforts in creating top-quality food and beverage flavors in the United States. Located in Cerritos, California, the facility's renovation was completed on February 21, 2025. This renowned manufacturer is focused on expanding its presence in the U.S. market, showcasing its dedication to innovation in the sector.

news.headline: GRAIL (Nasdaq: GRAL) to present at TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference in Boston on Feb. 25, 2025.
news.summary: A healthcare company based in Menlo Park, California, GRAIL, Inc. (Nasdaq: GRAL), revealed on February 21, 2025, its focus on early cancer detection for effective treatment. The company is scheduled to participate in the TD Cowen 45th Annual Health Care Conference in Boston. This event will provide an opportunity for company management to present key insights and strategies on Tuesday.

news.headline: Vermont Slauson EDC gets $100,000 grant from PNC Bank for LA small businesses, aims to boost community.
news.summary: Aiming to boost small businesses and bridge the digital gap for a more robust community, a variety of initiatives, such as a CEO Series and Digital Accelerator program, will be funded. This effort, based in Los Angeles, is set to accelerate growth and inclusivity. The plans are designed to uplift businesses, with a particular focus on fostering digital advancement. The initiative comes as part of a wider mission to empower the community, through which significant results are expected.

news.headline: Ivalua NOW 2025 event in Redwood City will gather thousands to explore AI's role in elevating procurement strategies.
news.summary: Ivalua NOW 2025 is set to bring together a multitude of procurement experts to delve into new approaches in advancing procurement. Taking place in Redwood City, California, on February 21, 2025, this event is expected to attract thousands of attendees. Known as the leading gathering for procurement and supply chain professionals, Ivalua NOW offers a platform for exploring cutting-edge strategies and techniques. Save the date for this upcoming event that promises to showcase the latest innovations in procurement practices.

news.headline: Texas advocates gather at Capitol to push for Cardiac Emergency Response Plans in schools during Heart Month. American Heart Association urges Texas State Legislators to require CERPs in all public schools. Support needed for policy to save lives.
news.summary: In the state of Texas, there is a pressing need for legislative support to implement a life-saving policy in public schools. The American Heart Association is urging Texas State Legislators to enact a mandate for a Cardiac Emergency Response Plan (CERP) to be established in all schools across the state. This initiative aims to equip students, faculty, and staff with the necessary tools and protocols to respond effectively in cardiac emergency situations. The proposal seeks to ensure that schools are prepared to address health crises promptly, potentially saving numerous lives. The advocacy emphasizes the importance of swift action in passing this policy to enhance the safety and well-being of individuals within the Texas public school system.

news.headline: Next Bridge Hydrocarbons receives additional SEC comments on Feb 21, 2025. Oil and gas company operates in TX, LA, OK.
news.summary: Today, an oil and natural gas exploration and production company, Next Bridge Hydrocarbons, Inc., based in MIDLAND, Texas, shared disappointing news. The company, with operations in Texas, Louisiana, and Oklahoma, expressed their disappointment in an announcement made on Feb. 21, 2025.

news.headline: Bank47, formerly LifeSteps Bank and Trust, expands to Huntsville with a fresh brand and concierge banking services, marking an exciting new chapter for the bank.
news.summary: In Huntsville, Alabama on February 21, 2025, Bank47, previously known as LifeSteps Bank and Trust, announced the opening of its headquarters. This move represents a significant milestone for the bank as it embarks on a new era with a rebranded identity and a progressive banking strategy. The name change signifies the institution's dedication to innovation in the banking sector.

news.headline: Team Jade launches co-op campaign Black Hawk Down for Delta Force, available for free on PC. Los Angeles, Feb. 21, 2025 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: A new co-op campaign called Black Hawk Down is now available for free on PC as announced by Team Jade on Feb. 21, 2025. Players can lead their squad through the challenges of Mogadishu in this PvE campaign designed for the first-person tactical shooter Delta Force. This highly anticipated release offers an immersive co-op experience for gamers to enjoy together.

news.headline: MultiCorp International, Inc. formalizes agreement to leverage buy-out Bitcoin, initial purchase of $25,000,000 funded through bank loan.
news.summary: Agoura Hills, California - On February 21, 2025, MultiCorp International, Inc. in partnership with 40 Brightwater LLC disclosed plans for acquiring an initial $25,000,000 (twenty-five million USD) worth of Bitcoin. This acquisition would be facilitated through a leveraged buy-out arrangement financed by Edwards Capital N.A. LLC's correspondent bank loan.

news.headline: Cloudastructure introduces AI-powered mobile surveillance trailers using cutting-edge technology for high security.
news.summary: Utilizing cutting-edge technology in both hardware and software, a groundbreaking mobile surveillance system has been developed, offering unparalleled monitoring capabilities. This innovative system integrates advanced hardware components with state-of-the-art software to provide exceptional surveillance on the go. This advancement represents a significant milestone in the field of mobile surveillance, promising increased efficiency and accuracy in monitoring activities.

news.headline: Russia would insist in talks that part of $300 bln frozen assets be used in Russia-controlled Ukraine - Sources.
